introSection: OzIris is a Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France. Opened on 7 April 2012, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and installed by RCS GmbH.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: OzIris is the first Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster without a pre-drop, as well as the first of its kind to contain both a dive loop and an immelmann.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.

fullText:
OzIris is a Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster at Parc Astérix in Plailly, Hauts-de-France, France. Opened on 7 April 2012, it was manufactured by Bolliger & Mabillard and installed by RCS GmbH.

OzIris is the first Bolliger & Mabillard inverted roller coaster without a pre-drop, as well as the first of its kind to contain both a dive loop and an immelmann.

3 trains with 8 cars per train. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 32 riders per train.
